# hush_sendgrid_access_privilege (Resource)

Manage SendGrid access privileges in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a SendGrid access privilege with mail send and template scopes
resource "hush_sendgrid_access_privilege" "example" {
  name        = "my-sendgrid-privilege"
  description = "Mail sending with template access"
  scopes      = ["mail.send", "templates.read", "templates.create"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the SendGrid access privilege
- `scopes` (List of String) The list of SendGrid API scopes

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the SendGrid access privilege

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the SendGrid access privilege
- `type` (String) The type of access privilege
